h-title: font-family: var(--display); font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--black); letter-spacing: -0.2px;
name-text: font-family: var(--display); font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--black); letter-spacing: -0.4px;
name-meta: font-family: var(--body); font-size: 13px; color: var(--stone); margin-top: 4px;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--stone); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 500; font-family: var(--display); letter-spacing: 0.2px;
